title: gnaphalium sylvaticum var. rectum
intro: Gnaphalium sylvaticum var. rectum, also known as the upright cudweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and wounds. The health benefits of gnaphalium sylvaticum var. rectum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as applied topically in the form of creams or ointments, making it a versatile and valuable natural remedy.
